zh.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster是William de Lancaster II和Helawise de Stuteville的女兒，於大約1170年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾。她與Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1226年9月之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster是William de Lancaster II和Helawise de Stuteville的女儿，于大约1170年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾。她与Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1226年9月之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster was born about 1170, in Kendal, Westmorland, England as the daughter of William de Lancaster II and Helawise de Stuteville. She married Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died after September 1226, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster est née environ 1170, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, fille de William de Lancaster II et Helawise de Stuteville. Elle a épousé Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après septembre 1226, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster wurde um 1170 in Kendal, Westmorland, England, als Tochter von William de Lancaster II und Helawise de Stuteville geboren. Sie hat Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach September 1226 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster è nata il circa 1170 nel Kendal, Westmorland, England come figlia di William de Lancaster II e Helawise de Stuteville. Lei sposato Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il settembre 1226, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancasterは約1170年にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルでWilliam de Lancaster IIとHelawise de Stutevilleの娘として生まれた。Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfredと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1226年9月以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster(은)는 대략 1170년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 William de Lancaster II(와)과 Helawise de Stuteville의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 9월 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra filha de William de Lancaster II e Helawise de Stuteville. Ela casou-se com Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após setembro de 1226, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Helewise de Lancaster родилась около 1170 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия. Её родителей звали William de Lancaster II и Helawise de Stuteville. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла после сентябрь 1226 г. в её родном городе.

Se casó con Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió después de septiembre de 1226, en su pueblo.
